text.title: Thumbs-Down Pipeline — Decision Tree
text.summary: Routes a feedback row through PII → cluster → judge-vote → admit-or-cap gates.

decision-tree.root-question: Has the PII scrubber marked the candidate `pii_clean: true`?

conclusion.verdict: QUARANTINE — never enter eval set; human review required

branch.question: Is the candidate part of a cluster ≥3 within last 4h?

conclusion.verdict: PAGE on-call; pause ship gate for affected intent; admit cluster after triage
REJECT this iteration; route to next week's manual triage
DEFER to next week; do NOT raise the cap
ADMIT to eval suite via PR; bump eval-suite version

example.trace: 3-cluster + clean PII + unanimous judges + cap available → admit + page
example.code: pii_clean=true → cluster_size=3 → r5-stop-the-bleed verdict; subsequent admit after triage applies r1
